context: Tests whether the authentication skill guidance is applied to iOS passkey registration, passkey sign-in, AutoFill-assisted suggestions, and physical security key fallback.

checklist.name: Associated Domains
checklist.description: Requires an Associated Domains entitlement for the relying-party domain using the `webcredentials:` service.

checklist.name: Platform passkey provider
checklist.description: Uses `ASAuthorizationPlatformPublicKeyCredentialProvider(relyingPartyIdentifier:)` for platform passkeys and distinguishes registration requests from assertion requests.

checklist.name: Server challenge and verification
checklist.description: States that registration and assertion challenges come from the relying-party server and that the resulting credentials or assertions must be verified server-side before creating a session.

checklist.name: AutoFill-assisted sign-in
checklist.description: Uses a username field with `.username` text content type and calls `performAutoFillAssistedRequests()` for inline passkey suggestions.

checklist.name: Security key fallback
checklist.description: Uses `ASAuthorizationSecurityKeyPublicKeyCredentialProvider` only for physical security key fallback, not as the default platform passkey provider.

checklist.name: Authorization UI plumbing
checklist.description: Mentions `ASAuthorizationController` delegate and presentation context provider requirements for presenting the AuthenticationServices UI.
